summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was chosen because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Closed candidate PRs are kept closed, open non-security PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review, and the linked security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Open focused PR remains an independent review candidate; merge and fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Already-closed candidate; closure actions are invalid for closed refs.
Already closed as implemented on main; no further action is valid in plan mode.
Already closed; do not emit another close action.
Open PR with failing proof/checks remains independent; unavailable updated_at and failing checks block any mutating close or merge-style recommendation.
Open compatibility PR needs maintainer/proof follow-up outside this inventory shard; no close or merge action is safe.
Broad open feature/fix PR is not a duplicate in this shard and needs normal maintainer review; merge is disallowed by job frontmatter.
Open broad multi-fix PR lacks proof and is not safely closable as duplicate or low-signal under this job.
Already closed as obsolete/fixed on main; no closure action is valid.
Open non-security PR remains an independent maintainer-review candidate; this shard cannot merge or repair it.
Security-sensitive linked PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
